honesty: Field names match common PatentsView / patent-bulk JSON exports.
Record content is synthetic for reproducible CI (not a live API pull).
Replace this file with a real PatentsView bulk/API export of the same shape; no code changes required.
US patent text in production dumps is typically public as published patents — verify license for your jurisdiction before redistribution.
how_to_replace: 1. Export or download patents JSON with patents[] array.

patents.patent_title: Metal-air electrochemical cell with iron anode for multi-day discharge
patents.patent_abstract: A metal-air cell uses a porous iron anode and oxygen cathode to provide multi-day depth of discharge suitable for grid firming applications. The cell supports reversible iron oxidation cycling under alkaline electrolyte conditions.

patents.patent_title: Oxygen electrode stack for long-duration iron-air modules
patents.patent_abstract: An oxygen electrode stack architecture improves efficiency of long-duration iron-air modules used for multi-day grid dispatch. The design reduces catalyst loading while maintaining reversible oxidation duty cycles.

patents.patent_title: Porous iron electrode structures for hundred-hour storage
patents.patent_abstract: Porous iron electrode structures enable hundred-hour depth-discharge operation in iron-air systems. Feedstock morphology of food-grade iron powder is controlled to stabilize reversible iron oxidation over repeated cycles.

patents.patent_title: Alkaline electrolyte additives for iron-air grid modules
patents.patent_abstract: Electrolyte additives extend cycle life of iron-air grid modules under multi-day firming duty. The formulation is compatible with porous iron electrodes and oxygen electrode stacks used in regional utility pilots.
